title: Weather Stripping Tape, Doors Windows Draught Excluder Self-Adhesive Anti-Collision Rubber E Type Foam Sealing Tape, Rubber Sound Insulation for Door Window Draught Stopper (White E-9 x 4-10 m)
features: 【Strong Adhesive】 The door/window sealing strip with updated strong grid adhesive backing is not only particularly adhesive and ensures adhesion to any material surface. It is waterproof and non-degumming. After installation, it provides long-term protection.

【Highly Elastic Sealing Strip】 The porous design E-type weather sripping can effectively reduce noise. The foam seal tapes can quickly return to its original shape after squeezing and has good cushioning performance. It is very suitable for wind, dust, noise and cold protection, protects doors and windows and effectively reduces the wear and noise of doors and windows when opening and closing.

【Widely Used】 This self-adhesive foam tape is made of EPDM Eco-friendly materials, which is weatherproof, chemically corrosion-resistant, dustproof, shockproof, waterproof, flame-retardant, soundproof, heat-insulating, temperature resistant from -40°C to +90°C. They are widely used in various door seal and window insulation, sound absorbing materials, sealing and insulation materials for air conditioning or refrigerator.

【Long Enough】We offer 10 m / roll (2 seals x 5 m / seal)*1 Roll, which is long enough to be attached to all your doors and windows. Width: 9 mm, thickness: 4mm(single seal), the corresponding gap size is approx. 1.5mm to 3.5mm. Please Note: This sealing strip can be divided into two 9mm seals (5m each).

【Easy to Install】Solvent free, quick installation without drilling and screwing. Please tear vertically into 2 seals before starting work. Thoroughly clean the window frame and insert the seal in the right place, then cut it according to your needs.The adhesive adheres particularly well to most surfaces and is therefore particularly popular as a universal seal tape.
description: Product Description Why choose UPSEN sealing tape? Upsen strong collision avoidance foam that wipes off against dust, waterproof. Provide you a warm and cosy home! Protect the window and door, reduce abrasion and noise on the window/door when opening and closing. Reduce noise from outside and slamming of sliding door, against noise, wind, snow, give you a quiet and comfortable life. Block the cold and hot air cross, help save energy and reduce electricity cost. Soundproof, Windproof, Dustproof, Excellent aging resistance. Our self-adhesive sealing tape can help you solve the following problems Special Features Strong Adhesive The rubber sealing strip with updated strong grid adhesive backing is not only extra adhesive and ensures adhesion to any material surface. No residue when removed, it provides long-term protection after installation. Easy to Install Our self-adhesive sealing tape is quick to install without drilling or tightening. Stick one end of the sealing strip to the door frame at a specific point, then tear off the other protective film and stick it on according to the installation path. Wide Use It is very suitable as wind, dust, noise and cold protection, protects doors and windows and effectively reduces wear and noise of doors and windows when opening and closing. Specifications Material: EPDM foam rubber Shape: E-type One roll length: 10 M Size W x D: 9 x 4 mm Suitable for gap width: 1.5-3.5 mm Long Enough 1 roll length (10 m)= 2 seals * 5 m / seal 20 m=2 rolls It is long enough to be fixed to all your doors and windows.
